Event: Royal Challenge - Season 45
Event Date: 01/01/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI292
Pole of Power

Once every 8 sec., the unit removes 4 random positive effects from each of 3 enemy units with the lowest current health, and sunders their armor. When their armor is sundered, the enemy units receive pure damage equal to 35% of their max health, and their physical and magic armor is reduced by 40% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 1 times. These enemy units also receive pure damage equal to 30% of their max health for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Royal Challenge - Season 45

Event date: 01/01/2026

Sage bot code: RI292

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
